```{r echo = F, fig.width=10, fig.height=5}
unique.genes = matrix(rep(0, ncol(combination.matrix) *
                            length(gene.list)), 
                      ncol = ncol(combination.matrix))
row.names(unique.genes) = gene.list

i=1
while(i<=ncol(combination.matrix)){
  combo = row.names(combination.matrix)[combination.matrix[,i]==1]
  common.genes = abdm.list[[combo[1]]]
  j=2
  while(j<=length(combo)){
    common.genes = intersect(common.genes, abdm.list[[combo[j]]])
    j=j+1
  }
  unique.genes[common.genes,i] = 1
  i=i+1
}

DEG.symbol = c(rep("", nrow(combination.matrix)+1), GeneIDKey[row.names(unique.genes), "Symbol"])

total.DEGs = apply(unique.genes, MARGIN = 2, sum)
shared.DEGs = rbind(combination.matrix, unique.genes)
shared.DEGs = rbind(total.DEGs, shared.DEGs)

shared.DEGs = cbind(DEG.symbol, shared.DEGs)


##write.csv(shared.DEGs, "/Users/johncsantiago/Desktop/A4VAbdomen-G85R_SharedDEGs.csv")

```




```{r echo = F, fig.width=10, fig.height=5}

Day3.list = list(G85RFxWTF = GRF,
                 G85RMxWTM = GRM,
                 A4VF.3HxWTF.3H = A4V.3FH,
                 A4VF.3TxWTF.3T = A4V.3FT,
                 A4VF.3AxWTF.3A = A4V.3FA,
                 A4VM.3HxWTM.3H = A4V.3MH,
                 A4VM.3TxWTM.3T = A4V.3MT,
                 A4VM.3AxWTM.3A = A4V.3MA)

#upset(fromList(abdm.list), nsets = 7, nintersects = NA)

use.list = Day3.list

combination.matrix = matrix(rep(1, length(names(use.list))))
row.names(combination.matrix) = names(use.list)

n = 6
while(n>0){
  temp = combn(row.names(combination.matrix), n)
  i=1
  while(i<=ncol(temp)){
    combo = combination.matrix[,1]-1
    combo[temp[,i]] = 1
    combination.matrix = cbind(combination.matrix, combo)
    colnames(combination.matrix) = c(1:ncol(combination.matrix))
    i=i+1
  }
  n=n-1
}


gene.list = c(use.list[[1]])
i=1
while(i<=length(use.list)){
  gene.list = c(gene.list, 
              setdiff(use.list[[i]], gene.list))
  i=i+1
}

unique.genes = matrix(rep(0, ncol(combination.matrix) *
                            length(gene.list)), 
                      ncol = ncol(combination.matrix))
row.names(unique.genes) = gene.list

i=1
while(i<=ncol(combination.matrix)){
  combo = row.names(combination.matrix)[combination.matrix[,i]==1]
  common.genes = use.list[[combo[1]]]
  j=2
  while(j<=length(combo)){
    common.genes = intersect(common.genes, use.list[[combo[j]]])
    j=j+1
  }
  unique.genes[common.genes,i] = 1
  i=i+1
}

DEG.symbol = c(rep("", nrow(combination.matrix)+1), GeneIDKey[row.names(unique.genes), "Symbol"])

total.DEGs = apply(unique.genes, MARGIN = 2, sum)
shared.DEGs = rbind(combination.matrix, unique.genes)
shared.DEGs = rbind(total.DEGs, shared.DEGs)

shared.DEGs = cbind(DEG.symbol, shared.DEGs)


##write.csv(shared.DEGs, "/Users/johncsantiago/Desktop/A4V3Day-G85R_SharedDEGs.csv")

```





```{r echo = F, fig.width=10, fig.height=5}

Day9.list = list(G85RFxWTF = GRF,
                 G85RMxWTM = GRM,
                 A4VF.9HxWTF.9H = A4V.9FH,
                 A4VF.9TxWTF.9T = A4V.9FT,
                 A4VF.9AxWTF.9A = A4V.9FA,
                 A4VM.9HxWTM.9H = A4V.9MH,
                 A4VM.9TxWTM.9T = A4V.9MT,
                 A4VM.9AxWTM.9A = A4V.9MA)

#upset(fromList(abdm.list), nsets = 7, nintersects = NA)

use.list = Day9.list

combination.matrix = matrix(rep(1, length(names(use.list))))
row.names(combination.matrix) = names(use.list)

n = 6
while(n>0){
  temp = combn(row.names(combination.matrix), n)
  i=1
  while(i<=ncol(temp)){
    combo = combination.matrix[,1]-1
    combo[temp[,i]] = 1
    combination.matrix = cbind(combination.matrix, combo)
    colnames(combination.matrix) = c(1:ncol(combination.matrix))
    i=i+1
  }
  n=n-1
}


gene.list = c(use.list[[1]])
i=1
while(i<=length(use.list)){
  gene.list = c(gene.list, 
              setdiff(use.list[[i]], gene.list))
  i=i+1
}

unique.genes = matrix(rep(0, ncol(combination.matrix) *
                            length(gene.list)), 
                      ncol = ncol(combination.matrix))
row.names(unique.genes) = gene.list

i=1
while(i<=ncol(combination.matrix)){
  combo = row.names(combination.matrix)[combination.matrix[,i]==1]
  common.genes = use.list[[combo[1]]]
  j=2
  while(j<=length(combo)){
    common.genes = intersect(common.genes, use.list[[combo[j]]])
    j=j+1
  }
  unique.genes[common.genes,i] = 1
  i=i+1
}

DEG.symbol = c(rep("", nrow(combination.matrix)+1), GeneIDKey[row.names(unique.genes), "Symbol"])

total.DEGs = apply(unique.genes, MARGIN = 2, sum)
shared.DEGs = rbind(combination.matrix, unique.genes)
shared.DEGs = rbind(total.DEGs, shared.DEGs)

shared.DEGs = cbind(DEG.symbol, shared.DEGs)


##write.csv(shared.DEGs, "/Users/johncsantiago/Desktop/A4V9Day-G85R_SharedDEGs.csv")

```




```{r echo = F, fig.width=10, fig.height=5}

Day40.list = list(G85RFxWTF = GRF,
                 G85RMxWTM = GRM,
                 A4VF.40HxWTF.40H = A4V.40FH,
                 A4VF.40TxWTF.40T = A4V.40FT,
                 A4VF.40AxWTF.40A = A4V.40FA,
                 A4VM.9HxWTM.9H = A4V.9MH,
                 A4VM.9TxWTM.9T = A4V.9MT,
                 A4VM.9AxWTM.9A = A4V.9MA)

#upset(fromList(abdm.list), nsets = 7, nintersects = NA)

use.list = Day40.list

combination.matrix = matrix(rep(1, length(names(use.list))))
row.names(combination.matrix) = names(use.list)

n = 6
while(n>0){
  temp = combn(row.names(combination.matrix), n)
  i=1
  while(i<=ncol(temp)){
    combo = combination.matrix[,1]-1
    combo[temp[,i]] = 1
    combination.matrix = cbind(combination.matrix, combo)
    colnames(combination.matrix) = c(1:ncol(combination.matrix))
    i=i+1
  }
  n=n-1
}


gene.list = c(use.list[[1]])
i=1
while(i<=length(use.list)){
  gene.list = c(gene.list, 
              setdiff(use.list[[i]], gene.list))
  i=i+1
}


unique.genes = matrix(rep(0, ncol(combination.matrix) *
                            length(gene.list)), 
                      ncol = ncol(combination.matrix))
row.names(unique.genes) = gene.list
intersect.genes = unique.genes

i=1
while(i<=ncol(combination.matrix)){
  combo = row.names(combination.matrix)[combination.matrix[,i]==1]
  not.combo = row.names(combination.matrix)[combination.matrix[,i]==0]
  common.genes = use.list[[combo[1]]]
  j=2
  while(j<=length(combo)){
    common.genes = intersect(common.genes, use.list[[combo[j]]])
    j=j+1
  }
  
  not.common.genes = common.genes
  k=length(not.combo)
  while(k>0){
    not.common.genes = setdiff(not.common.genes,
                               use.list[[not.combo[[k]]]])
    k=k-1
  }
  
  
  unique.genes[common.genes,i] = 1
  i=i+1
}


DEG.symbol = c(rep("", nrow(combination.matrix)+1), GeneIDKey[row.names(unique.genes), "Symbol"])

total.DEGs = apply(unique.genes, MARGIN = 2, sum)
shared.DEGs = rbind(combination.matrix, unique.genes)
shared.DEGs = rbind(total.DEGs, shared.DEGs)

shared.DEGs = cbind(DEG.symbol, shared.DEGs)


##write.csv(shared.DEGs, "/Users/johncsantiago/Desktop/A4V40Day-G85R_SharedDEGs.csv")


```
